Event: The Abyssal Adventure

Sage Bot Item Code: A317
Leviathan's Melody

Triggers: 4 sec

Monolith
The unit removes all positive effects from 4 random enemy units and makes them unable to receive new positive effects for 4 sec. The targets are petrified for 4 sec. and receive 450000 magic damage. The petrified enemy units cannot move, and take 40% more damage, for 4 sec.

Requirements: 90-100
